testcase.name: test_log_call_creates_row_and_activity

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None in ('CALL', 'call') + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad77afbba00>('channel') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad77afbba00> = {'callDuration': None, 'callOutcome': 'INTERESTED', 'createdAt': '2026-05-19T14:42:55.927Z', 'createdBy': {'email': 'agent@realestate.com', 'id': 'cmpcpk2pq0000hah8u1jzt8qs', 'name': 'Test Agent', 'role': 'AGENT'}, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_communications.py:170: in test_log_call_creates_row_and_activity assert comm.get("channel") in ("CALL", "call") E AssertionError: assert None in ('CALL', 'call') E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad77afbba00>('channel') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad77afbba00> = {'callDuration': None, 'callOutcome': 'INTERESTED', 'createdAt': '2026-05-19T14:42:55.927Z', 'createdBy': {'email': 'agent@realestate.com', 'id': 'cmpcpk2pq0000hah8u1jzt8qs', 'name': 'Test Agent', 'role': 'AGENT'}, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_expired_token_surfaces_code_190

failure.message: AssertionError: Meta error code 190 not surfaced in body: {"error": "Message body is required"} assert '190' in '{"error": "Message body is required"}'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_communications.py:219: in test_expired_token_surfaces_code_190 assert "190" in blob, f"Meta error code 190 not surfaced in body: {blob}" E AssertionError: Meta error code 190 not surfaced in body: {"error": "Message body is required"} E assert '190' in '{"error": "Message body is required"}'
